headline: Warren Buffett Hit the Buy Button for $965,291,328 Late Last Year. Berkshire Now Owns Nearly 9.3% of This Leading Insurer.
summary: Despite holding record amounts of cash, he still did some shopping.

headline: Berkshire Hathaway Q4 Earnings, Revenues Miss Estimates, Fall Y/Y
summary: BRK.B's Q4 earnings and revenue miss estimates, with profit down year over year, even as full-year sales edged up and cash swelled to $51.9B.

raw.headline: Berkshire Hathaway Q4 Earnings, Revenues Miss Estimates, Fall Y/Y
raw.summary: BRK.B's Q4 earnings and revenue miss estimates, with profit down year over year, even as full-year sales edged up and cash swelled to $51.9B.

headline: PetSmart and Healthy Paws Announce Discount on Pet Insurance for Treats Rewards® Members
summary: PetSmart, the leading omni-channel pet retailer in North America, and Healthy Paws, a Chubb company (NYSE: CB) and a leading provider of accident and illness pet insurance coverage for dogs and cats, are enhancing their partnership by introducing a 10% discount on new pet insurance policies for Treats Rewards® members in most U.S. states.
